entry.title: Block Credit Memo in payment run
entry.content:
Hi,

We use F110 to make payments to multiple vendors, multiple company codes for a specific payment type.

Recently a vendor payment was made:

Company A - 3 invoices of $1000 each

Company B - 1 Credit Memo for $2000

F110 process made a payment of $1000 ($3000 invoices - $2000 credit memo)

Business does not want this to happen, they want the Credit Memo to be only applied for invoices in Company B and NOT Company A.

Is this possible, if yes what am I missing?

Thanks.

Raj

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: Nah, I try to put a breakpoint but when I call the POST, it didn't debug. When I use /h, it only debug PAI method on Gateway UI

entry.title: JCO_ERROR_RESOURCE: Invalid destination reference encountered (destination is null)
entry.content:
Hi, I got this error from using SAP Java Connector 3.1.3

 

This is stack trace I got

 

com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (106) JCO_ERROR_RESOURCE: Invalid destination reference encountered (destination is null)
	com.sap.conn.jco.rt.AbapRepository.queryFunctionTemplate(AbapRepository.java:1031)
	com.sap.conn.jco.rt.AbapRepository.queryFunctionTemplate(AbapRepository.java:634)
	com.sap.conn.jco.rt.AbapRepository.getFunctionTemplate(AbapRepository.java:896)
	com.sap.conn.jco.rt.BasicRepository.getFunction(BasicRepository.java:155)
	me.saro.sap.jco.SapManager.getFunction(SapManager.java:53)

 

 

How can I solve this problem? It just happened to call RFC. I've never seen it before..

Thank you.

entry.title: To create multiple comment in a table column - SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

I currently facing a issues where i need to create multiple comment in a table column it works, however when i comment in one of the cells it duplicated into another cells column as well. 

May I know is there any solution for this multiple comment in a table column ? 

Thank You,

Regards

Andrew

entry.title: Re: Attachment size control
entry.content: Files only up to a size of 100 MB can be uploaded using Attachment Service. You cannot restrict it to 5MB at user ID level

entry.title: Re: Commenting in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @former_member230921 ,

I want to ask, currently I have client that request to have multiple comment in column table, however I able to create the multiple comment in column table, but when I try to input the comment in a single cell, it duplicated the comment to the following cells as well, may I know any solution for this ?

Regards, 

Andrew

entry.title: Re: Update time account Using Integration center
entry.content: Did you got the solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Two colons in PATH
entry.content: Hi Robert, This is a known issue. Please take a look at this KB: 3509658 - The WLA related PATH setting in SYBASE environment files has extra ' : ' - SAP ASE https://me.sap.com/notes/3509658/E Workaround is what you mentioned already, that is to modify the SYBASE.xx manually and remove the extra character. cheers, Tony

entry.title: Re: SAP Table for Standard values in Production Order Ope...
entry.content: You can use CDS View: I_MfgOrderOperationVH, thank you! https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_MFGORDEROPERATIONVH

entry.title: Re: SAD SD : Query of GST rate having differ for differen...
entry.content:
How the material price will be calculated-based on UOM? or something else..Pl explain.

If UOM/some other field in material master-You can add these fields into the pricing condition table &the GST rate related condition type also should be updated with the same UOM/field inclusion in condition tables with VK11 maintenance-accordingly correct GST value will be taken into sales order-Pl try this & update us on any issue.

Regards

Phanikumar

entry.title: SAP document for SAP ECC to S4HANA(TM, EWM) Integration document
entry.content:
We have SAP ECC as ERP & we are using both TM & EWM in S/4HANA & we are looking for Integration steps document to transfer the master data, transaction data & complete the process using the steps
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP document for SAP ECC to S4HANA(TM, EWM) Integrati...
entry.content:
Integration guides can be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DIGITAL_SUPPLY_CHAIN_MANAGEMENT_EDITION_S4HANA

TM Integration Guide is for ECC-S/4TM integration.

Integration of EWM and TM in One Client is for TM-EWM integration in one S/4HANA box.

entry.title: How to set default values ​​for application job parameters
entry.content:
How can we set default values ​​for parameters in an application job?

We are currently investigating how to develop using Developer Extensibility on S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

In my understanding, I thought that et_parameter_val in if_apj_dt_exec_object~get_parameters would be the function, but parameter values in the application job is displayed as blank.

I am looking for help with the following:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/99dcde1a72ed4e7fb0959ead46a7fbf5.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
As a Consultant I would highly recommend to question the Demand before ;).
350 User ? This doesn't sound like technical Users.
Is the Company you are working for realling creating named DB User for each frontend User?

If you are using another Frontend tool then SAC, wouldn't you rather create 1 DB User for e.g. each Business Department so they can share the login?
Of course this changes if you need to use Data Access Controll ( than you again need 1 DB User for each Frontend User)

entry.title: CLEARING DOCUMENT COLUMN CONTENT
entry.content:
I would just like to ask why when looking at FB03, the line item with the g/l account 2105200000 does not contain the clearing document number when, it is cleared by the document number indicated in the other line items.

Is it possible that it is due to the type of G/L used? Or are there any factors that can be considered?

entry.title: Re: Filter latest log time from log data
entry.content:
I don't know what you are up to, or trying to solve, but your request kinda sounds like a SQL Group by (max Timestamp) rather than a Datasphere specific Quesiton.
If so, you would Join the Table with the logs with the temp table (only max timestamp for each user) and you should receive your requested Result ( only the row for the User with the lates Timestamp) 
HINT: Depends on your Datatype of Timestamp, you can only do a MAX on Numbers (you maybe need to cast the Datatype) 
If not you should explain your situation a little bit better, like where do you have that List of Users and what is the Datasphere Part where you need help.

You can solve your Request with a Graphical View aswell, if you don't want to use SQL at all. 
1) Convert Date to INT
2) AGGREGATE with MAX TIMESTAMP
3) JOIN THE TABLE WITH ITSELF with the PK and the TIMESTAMP as Join Condition

This way the SQL you would need to code is generated in the Background by Datasphere:
SELECT
"LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"."CARRID" AS "CARRID",
"LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"."CONNID" AS "CONNID",
"LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"."FLDATE" AS "FLDATE",
MAX(TO_INT("LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"."FLDATE")) AS "Convert_Date_TO_INT"
FROM "LT_CSV_SFLIGHT" AS "LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"
GROUP BY "LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"."CARRID", "LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"."CONNID", "LT_CSV_SFLIGHT(1)_0"."FLDATE";

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: SAP Process Control Joining Forces with Unified Compliance
entry.content:
For as long as I can remember, always having an up-to-date best practice compliance framework has been a key concern for Compliance Officers that I talk to. And one option could simply be to onboard every new piece of legislation or guidance that is issued.

But this then creates a superinflation in the number of requirements tracked and most likely a multiplication of controls designed to address each of these requirements. Both of which won’t lead to happy users… Or increased compliance for that matter!

As I am sure you already know, SAP Process Control natively embeds a Multi-Compliance Framework which enables organizations to implement a variety of compliance initiatives, such as financial compliance, operational compliance, or others as needed, and to then implement shared testing and assessments across compliance initiatives.

In short: this enables the testing of the control just once, with results published in all associated regulations.

This of course addresses the roll-out of the control testing, but it didn’t address the regulatory intake issue.

As a result, and as directed by our customers, we worked on answering 4 main questions:

  • How can organizations get best practice compliance content directly in SAP Process Control?
  • How can the organization’s existing controls be used for attestation under multiple regulatory initiatives?
  • Which regulatory initiatives overlap the others?
  • Which regulatory initiatives fill the gaps left by others?

To answer these requirements, SAP partnered with Unified Compliance!

 

Unified Compliance Overview

 

For those not yet familiar with Unified Compliance, allow me to make a short introduction.

Since 1992, Unified Compliance has developed ground-breaking tools to support IT – and more widely GRC – best practices with a special focus on regulatory compliance, metrics, systems continuity, and governance. Developed in 2005, the Common Controls Hub is Unified Compliance’s flagship product and is the SaaS portal built on top of the Unified Compliance Framework. The UCF content and methodology is the direct result of Unified Compliance’s deep understanding of regulations and standards as well as decades of experience consulting for clients, publications, and vendors in the mission-critical IT arena.

This results in The Unified Compliance Framework having a large reach with:

  • 1,000 mapped authority documents
  • 1,000,000+ individual mandated
  • 10,000+ common controls
  • 250,000 interconnected words and phrases in the dictionary

 

A New Custom-Built Integration to UCF from SAP Process Control

 

Since SAP Process Control already has the technical features and functionalities to manage multi-compliance, we decided to partner with Unified Compliance to create a custom-build integration specifically for this purpose.

This integration is now live and documented on the SAP Help Portal and in a dedicated SAP Note 3473223 - Release Information Note for SAP Process Control Integrate with Unified Compliance Framework (UCF).

With this integration, UCF and SAP Process Control customers can now benefit from best-in-class control in best-in-class control software, effortlessly!

The content flow is rather simple, with 2 new SAP Fiori apps that have just been delivered:

  • Import Common Control Objectives: to import select UCF content into SAP Process Control
  • Manage Common Control Objectives: to map new regulatory and best practice content ingested from UCF to existing or new central and local controls in SAP Process Control

 

With this new integration, we hope that our joint customers will be able to react more promptly to frequently changing regulations, while at the same time increase efficiency with constricted resources and high-pressure deadlines.

Since, reporting and monitoring are crucial aspects of all compliance programs, we have also introduced 2 SAP Fiori apps:

  • Analyze Control Coverage: to review the information mapped to common objects, such as the controls by regulations, by common control objectives, etc.
  • Common Control Objectives Overview: to display an overview on the compliance status of the control (manual and automated control results, etc.) with drill-down

 

But don’t just take my word for it (or blog in the present case) and have a look at the detailed step-by-step flow recorded by Marie-Luise Wagener-Kirchner and Paul Petraschk from SAP GRC Product Management:

What about you, how do you make sure that your compliance framework is always up to date? I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: Issue with : Perform Maintenance Jobs without assignm...
entry.content:
Hi Riyaj,

Refer to comment thread from Vikas in this previous response: question

Also refer to commentary in SAP Note: 3434428

There is a bit of logic that is coded into this app:

  • "Quick Confirmation" action only works for the 'assigned technician'.
  • Once the original Technician has assigned themselves AND started the Order Operation, then non-assigned technicians can post time confirmations to the operation.
  • Those additional time confirmations can't be done by the technicians via the "Quick Confirmation" action, those technicians must drill into the operation and use the Record Time subscreen.

Tim

entry.title: Re: Mass changes to field " Person Responsible" in Cost c...
entry.content:
Hi Mahavir,

there is currently not app for a mass change of cost centers available.

But you can leverage the "SAP Build Process Automation" for the mass change of cost center attributes like the "Person Responsible". The solution is described here https://api.sap.com/package/eu10.storecontentdevacc.massmaintenanceofcostcenters/documents

Best regards

Sebastian

entry.title: Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA TM to Third Party Integration
entry.content:
We need to integrate SAP S/4HANA TM to 3PL(Third Party) & We are looking for Best Practices or any standard SAP document for Integration via CPI or any other helpful steps.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA TM to Third Party Inte...
entry.content:
here is no consistent best practice for this scenario. You can use several standard enterprise service messages to communicate with an external system.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/733c8b37b3f546a1b08750e8aeabb887/585f005090cd11de2b8d000f20fcb6a9.html

For more information on how S/4HANA TM is integrated with SAP Logistics Business Network, you can refer to the following blog and help portal, which providing information on how to connect S/4HANA and BN4L using above services via CPI. It can be used for any other non-SAP systems that need to receive TM freight documents.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-setup-direct-connection-from-on-prem-to-sap-logistics-business/ba-p/13470981

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_LBN_FC_OPTION/b4724b2f483e439782b60cab4407c25a/dc5cac19f07d4a05b12bb65695c989c6.html

Thanks in advance

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE_SDK/c4016b5564ed4c98bbade36a3a35202d/b09277d8bbf91014918fcaf44ed12828.html?locale=en-US&version=16.0.4.4

 

 

cheers

Tony

entry.title: #COE#BUMA filtered per plant but sent to all approvers in Teams and Responsibility app
entry.content:
Hello,

In Teams and Responsibility app, we setup filter per plant assignment in Responsibility Definition but we noticed that the filter is not working as expected and all of the approvers for each plants are notified. It sends workflow approvals to which have the same Team Functions.

Is there a way to filter per assignments on these types of attributes in teams and responsibility app for Purchase order transactions?

Regards!

entry.title: Re: UI Annotation for masking field value
entry.content:
Hi,

Did you already take a look at the section "Representation as a Masked Input Field" in page? Maybe this helps with your requirement.

Thanks and Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: SAC Memberset - Version Property
entry.content:
Instead of using Year property, you can maintain start and end period in version properties, the statement can be :

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/FIRST_PERIOD] TO [d/Version].[p/LAST_PERIOD]

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements and SAP CAP: How to make a field e...
entry.content:
Hi,

I think you are on the right track with FieldControl! This is also what we document under "Editability of the Field" section of Further Features of the Field - also here you find an example showing the value being set dynamically:

<Annotations Target="SAP__self.ReviewsType/AvailabilityCode">
    <Annotation Term=" SAP__Common.FieldControl" Path="__FieldControl/AvailabilityCode_FC"/>
</Annotations>

Could you try this approach?

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Not getting data and 401 Unauthorize error in Mobile...
entry.content: If "Launch in Browser" is able to load the oData then I don't see any reason why it should fail from the mobile app. I would recommend trying a fresh install, try uninstalling and reinstalling the application.

entry.title: Re: Automating OB52 - Opening and closing of the Posting...
entry.content:
You can use this simple ABAP program. And set monthly job for this program your period will automatically opens for new month.

REPORT z_auto_open_period.

DATA: lv_bukrs TYPE bukrs, " Company Code
lv_gjahr TYPE gjahr, " Fiscal Year
lv_monat TYPE monat, " Period (Month)
lv_new_period TYPE monat, " New Period
lt_t001b TYPE TABLE OF t001b, " Table for posting periods
ls_t001b TYPE t001b, " Structure for posting periods
lv_tope1 TYPE monat, " From Period
lv_tope2 TYPE monat. " To Period.

DATA: lt_bukrs TYPE TABLE OF bukrs WITH DEFAULT KEY,
lt_mkoar TYPE TABLE OF t001b-mkoar WITH DEFAULT KEY. " Account Types

DATA: lt_result TYPE TABLE OF t001b, " To hold results for ALV
ls_result TYPE t001b. " Structure for ALV display

APPEND '1000' TO lt_bukrs. " Company Code 1000
APPEND '2000' TO lt_bukrs. " Company Code 2000

* Add all account types that need to be updated
APPEND '+' TO lt_mkoar. " Valid for all account types
APPEND 'A' TO lt_mkoar. " Assets
APPEND 'C' TO lt_mkoar. " CO-PA: Profitability Analysis
APPEND 'D' TO lt_mkoar. " Customers
APPEND 'G' TO lt_mkoar. " Special Purpose Ledger
APPEND 'K' TO lt_mkoar. " Vendors
APPEND 'M' TO lt_mkoar. " Materials
APPEND 'S' TO lt_mkoar. " G/L accounts
APPEND 'V' TO lt_mkoar. " Contract accounts

* Define current fiscal year and period (example: Period 06 for Fiscal Year 2024)
lv_gjahr = '2024'. " Financial year 2024
lv_monat = '06'. " Current period is 06

* Increment the period to open the next one
lv_new_period = lv_monat + 1.

IF lv_new_period > 12.
lv_new_period = 1.
lv_gjahr = lv_gjahr + 1.
ENDIF.

* Process each company code in the list
LOOP AT lt_bukrs INTO lv_bukrs.

* For each company code, loop through all account types
LOOP AT lt_mkoar INTO DATA(lv_mkoar).

" Get the current posting period settings for the company code and account type
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001b INTO ls_t001b
WHERE bukrs = lv_bukrs
AND mkoar = lv_mkoar.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
" Prepare new data for updating the posting periods
ls_t001b-tope1 = lv_monat. " Update 'From period'
ls_t001b-tope2 = lv_new_period. " Update 'To period'

" Update the T001B table with the new period for the specific account type
MODIFY t001b FROM ls_t001b.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
" Save the result for ALV display
MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_t001b TO ls_result.
APPEND ls_result TO lt_result.
COMMIT WORK.
ELSE.
WRITE: / 'Error occurred while updating for Company:', lv_bukrs, 'Account Type:', lv_mkoar.
ENDIF.

ELSE.
WRITE: / 'Posting period not found for Company:', lv_bukrs, 'Account Type:', lv_mkoar.
ENDIF.

ENDLOOP.

ENDLOOP.

* ALV Display
DATA: lo_alv TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid,
lo_container TYPE REF TO cl_gui_custom_container,
lt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat,
ls_fieldcat TYPE lvc_s_fcat.

* Create a custom container for the ALV display
CREATE OBJECT lo_container
EXPORTING
container_name = 'ALV_CONTAINER'.

* Create ALV grid
CREATE OBJECT lo_alv
EXPORTING
i_parent = lo_container.

* Define field catalog for ALV
CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'BUKRS'.
ls_fieldcat-scrtext_s = 'Company Code'.
APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'MKOAR'.
ls_fieldcat-scrtext_s = 'Account Type'.
APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'TOPE1'.
ls_fieldcat-scrtext_s = 'From Period'.
APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'TOPE2'.
ls_fieldcat-scrtext_s = 'To Period'.
APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

* Set data for ALV display
CALL METHOD lo_alv->set_table_for_first_display
EXPORTING
i_structure_name = 'T001B'
CHANGING
it_outtab = lt_result
it_fieldcatalog = lt_fieldcat. " Corrected parameter handling

* Show the ALV display
CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display.

entry.title: Re: Not getting data and 401 Unauthorize error in Mobile...
entry.content: How does the project.json file? If I’m not mistaken you have to configure a destination here for running in cloudfoundry which will be used by BAS.

entry.title: a table with direct relation among the Request for Change, Change Types and TRs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to generate a report with relation between a Request for Change --> Normal Change --> All the TRs associated with it (in separate rows)

As of now, we export the data from the CRM_UI page, however, the relationship between the three is not available and we map that manually.

Can you please help us guide a way in which we can extract the data and create a report with relationship among the three or please let us know if a table is available with direct relation among the Request for Change, Change Types and TRs.

Regards,

KPMG Team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: a table with direct relation among the Request for Ch...
entry.content:
Hi team,

  • In standard, there is no such single table to display those data. In standard, you could go to sm_workcenter->admin cockpit->tab 'search', under the enterprise search, you could search all the data you required, like request for change ID, change type and TRs. All these data could be searched/displayed there. 
  • The tables for checking transaction type could be CRMD_ORDERADM_H, and for transport request of related changes, the related tables are /TMWFLOW/TRORD_N and /TMWFLOW/TRACK_N.

BR,

Shawn

entry.title: Re: Data locking in measures
entry.content:
You can configure and use SAC data lock feature to lock 3 measures. please check this help page for details:

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/e07d46e950794d5a928a9b16d1394de6.html

entry.title: PR workflow for my inbox sap s4hana 1809
entry.content:
Hi MM Gurus,

I want to activate workflows for PR & POs in the system. Currently, the release strategy is configured and users use me54n me55 & me28 & me29n. I want to activate the SAP inbox feature for pr pos. what steps of configuration I need to follow? My version is old it's 1809. I tried searching on Internet but certain paths are not available for this. I need guidance, please. 

Please also suggest the roles of MM functional ABAP & Basis Consultant for activation of PR PO workflow for SAP inbox

entry.title: Re: connect PostgreSQL, hyperscaler DB in power BI desktop
entry.content: I am also looking solution for the same issue. If you are able to achieve it, can you please let me know how you did it. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP PO version upgrade and security patch activity
entry.content: Current version is SP29

entry.title: Re: OData V4 / CDS - $count not implemented
entry.content: AFAIK ODava.publish annotation only supports OData V4. How did you manage to create the OData V4 service? Also, it's ?$count=true and not /$count=true

entry.title: Proof Of Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question regarding the Proof of Delivery concept, as explained below in the form of a business example.

ABC customer is relevant for the Proof of Delivery concept. ABC customer ordered 10 units of XYZ material. From the respective location, 10 units were delivered, and an inventory document was created for the 10 units. However, at the customer’s end, only 8 units were received. Based on this quantity, the customer will be billed only for 8 units. How will we deal with the remaining 2 units?

@Carlos_H_Rodriguez , @Fancy_Zou , @SAPSupport 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales 

Thank You

entry.title: Re: SAP PO version upgrade and security patch activity
entry.content: You can find the latest innovations and patches here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/825e9222e7ad4fe1988c6cc600bda779/a7a35cdf746c486fb4456bf0cdb8d90f.html this is the link to SP29. Later, if you read this URL, you have to manually flip to the SP version of your interest.

entry.title: Re: Visual Studio Code - Issues to access standard librar...
entry.content: The way you try to solve it is correct in my opinion but maybe something is wrong with one of the paths. Here you have an example how I did this for a custom library (which I didn’t want to load locally) at line 29:   https://github.com/lemaiwo/detailcomponent/blob/93cac62bf0bdad73223fbc1fe87d58af81235b7a/ui5.yaml#L29

entry.title: Re: Customer Hierarchies in Sales material listing and exclusion
entry.content: Informative

entry.title: Re: Proof Of Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for inviting me to address your question.

In short:
1. 10 units will be deducted from your company’s stock, as documented by the relevant material records.
2. Sales billing will reflect only 8 units.

Best regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Run the Report with tile(for standard variant) is giving issue but in webide is working fine
entry.content: I guess the upgrade broke something on ui. I would suggest to search for sap notes or create one.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content:
Nice!

One to cook for you, one to protect you, one to keep you warm, and one to do data intelligence 😸

entry.title: Re: Creating mass user using eCATT (script)
entry.content:
Hello,
I downloaded the variant file. However it got downloaded in transposed format. That is rows and column. Attached screenshot.
How can this be fixed ?

idPNAMEPTYPPINDEXVALUEVAL_TYPEDEEP_DATA
ECATTDEFAULTPASSWORD2I4Welcome@1234567  
ECATTDEFAULTPASSWORD1I3Welcome@1234567  
ECATTDEFAULTLASTNAMEI2SINGH  
ECATTDEFAULTFIRSTNAMEI1GAJINDER  
ECATTDEFAULTUSERIDI5GAJI_TEST

entry.title: Re: APM - Indicator monitoring not showing all values
entry.content: hi, We have encountered this behavior, this could be a bug, I recommend to create an ticket. On the other hand the values shown on 'Indicator monitoring' are aggregated values depending on the duration chosen. refer documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_APM/1bb12075258a41e1a024d28a6ddfe246/a2416a1b8a3a4343a4005579e6fbb66a.html.

entry.title: Re: Need to find BOM chang history for changes done & Mai...

entry.content: Done after 5 minutes because she used SAP Build Code? Smart dog 🐶

entry.title: Re: Connecting to BTP Cli, says wrong password
entry.content: I have the same issue. Has anyone fixed it?

entry.title: Re: Creating Change Documents for a Specific Field of a Database Table
entry.content:
This introduction is extremely detailed.

Thanks for sharing!

BR,

CY

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports License
entry.content: It depends. If it's a desktop application running on Windows (not Terminal Server though), you're covered by the free runtime. If it's a server application or they're using it on Terminal Server, they'll need a licence for Crystal Reports.

entry.title: Copy Inspection results from One inspection lot origin (04) to another lot origin(10)
entry.content:
Hello All,

The Client is performing result recording only once after GR of process order (inspection type -04) and we need to copy the same results when Inspection type - 10 is triggered.

Your prompt response is really appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports License
entry.content: Sorry, should have added, if you're selling a lot of this, you could get OEM licences but not sure how that's done any more (my time in Crystal OEM was 20+ years ago and I can no longer sell OEM through distribution)

entry.title: Re: connect PostgreSQL, hyperscaler DB in power BI desktop
entry.content:
Not able to connect DB instance directly so written one secured API using that retrieving data.
For dynamic token generation refer: 
https://advaiya.com/generate-dynamic-token-and-get-data-from-custom-api-in-power-bi/

entry.title: Re: AUTO height details section
entry.content:
Don't use page footers for anything more than page number or comments.

Group the report by quote number or equivalent with page throw after group footer or before group header (except on first page). Move your page footer stuff to the group footer.

Never have multiple lines in a single detail section. Split into multiple detail sections, then hide the blank bits.

entry.title: Re: KPI display error
entry.content:
Hi  mario_galeano

Please note that Adobe announced the end of support for Adobe Flash Player: https://theblog.adobe.com/adobe-flash-update/ and Microsoft announced the removal of the Adobe Flash Player in Microsoft Windows Operating Systems, see KB4577586.

Please check below blogs for more details:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/end-of-life-for-adobe-flash-based-dashboards-embedded-in-sap-business-one/ba-p/13465578

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How to Read Domain values using ABAP CDS Entity view
entry.content: Very Informative Post.

entry.title: Re: SAP HCM Mini Master Usage without Combability Pack
entry.content: I'd like to jump in on this question. I'd also be quite interested in the answer!

entry.title: Re: Job Evaluation in SuccessFactors compensation management
entry.content: Thanks Xavier for confirming...!!

entry.title: Single stage and multistage application
entry.content:
Single Stage and Multistage Job Applications

Overview: -

  • This feature enables the option to expose different application fields, at different points in the application process.
  • The purpose of configuring the multistage application is to allow users to control which fields to display to candidate or recruiting operators based on candidate status

Single stage application: -

  • Candidate completes the Application data at the initial stage only, which means the posted job while applying to the candidate that time only the Applicant can edit and fill in the details within the application process.
  • After applying for the Job the applicant is unable to edit/change the fields but able to see the fields.
  • But Recruiting users can able to see all the fields in all the statuses. 

 How to configure Single stage application: -

Enable Recruiting in Provisioning

  • Configure the fields that are required by the customer and provide the permissions for Roles.
  • See the below screenshot here the field permissions are provided as per Roles.

Example: - the particular Recruiting user needs permissions for Edit access to the particular fields then you can provide the Write access to that role user in entire statuses.

 

Here another Example

  •             All the Users have read permissions for particular fields in all the stages in Applicant status.
  •             These below fields are visible for all the users in all stages, but they don’t have any Write

permissions for fields

Multistage Applications: -

  • The purpose of configuring the multistage application is to allow users to control which fields to display to candidate or recruiting operators based on candidate status.

Configuration in XML template

  • In the Application Template we can give only a few permissions to users as found below screenshot.
  • we have to provide/Control the field permissions through the Job Requisition Template (JRDM) for All multi-users and multiple fields.

Application Template field permissions for Users: -

  • Here in application Template only few permissions provide to the Users
  • All other permissions give to the access to users in JRDM Template.

Permissions for users in JRDM template: -

  • Here the application fields are configured in the Candidate details Template But the permissions will be provided in the JRDM like the below screenshot.
  • In the screenshots There is an Applicant status Set Name Written.
  • And the permissions are provided as per Users.

 

  • Here the candidate Having these are the statuses have Write permissions for particular fields

  • As per above screenshot the Recruiting Users does have a Read permission for this particular fields in particular statuses.

Example: -

  • R Role users want to see some particular fields only in some stages that time we can restrict the permissions as per Requirement.
  • On these Statuses only, R can able to see and edit the fields no other statuses the user will not be able to do these things.

  • Here as per the Below screenshot in the HR INTERVIEW status the Recruiters need some details from the Candidate, At that time the candidate Received a mail Notification that was Already Configured in the applicant status set.
  • After the candidate logs in through the link he will Update the details as per Permissions which provided to Candidate and Recruiting users as well.
  • The candidate does have Write permissions for the Interview stage. The candidate fills in the needed details and updates the application. these details will be see the Recruiting users in the Audit trail.

 

Conclusion: -

  • Here the Beauty of Recruitment process is Restrict the application permissions as per the Roles and to the candidate as well.
  • So, the Fields will be secure and the candidate details only will be visible to Authorized Users in the organization.
  • The Candidate data will not be able to be seen by every user which are users which is why the data needs to be visible or editable.

entry.title: Re: Proof Of Delivery
entry.content:
Dear Fancy_zou,

Thank you for your prompt response.

My concern is, how will we deal with the remaining 2 units? The inventory has been reduced by 10 units, but we are billing for only 8 units. How will we handle these remaining 2 units? According to the Proof of Delivery (POD), we will not be able to charge the customer for them. Therefore, we need to adjust these units somewhere.

Please correct me if I am wrong.

Thank you.

entry.title: Can interview scheduling still be for Microsoft on prem and not Microsoft 365?
entry.content: Client uses Microsoft on prem and not Microsoft 365. Can interview scheduling still be used? How can it be maintained when manage interview scheduling is deprecated?

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation Difference must be zero before reconciling (message 3821-8)
Decouple TR
entry.content:
Hi SAP,


We will get a request to withdraw the charm and attached steps which we are following.

We are having few queries

a. We have withdraw the charm PHONE_NUMBER) and need to decouple the TR(ECDK918459) Please let us know the process to decouple TR's.
b. Could you please let us know steps which we have attached process is correct or not.

Thanks & Regards,

Naresh.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Decouple TR
entry.content:
Hi Naresh,

There are some prerequisites when decoupling the TR from ChaRM document, see below document for more details:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/2b6042c23fa044b6977fbf76258b0628.html

There is no standard report to decouple TR before you withdraw a ChaRM document, as it requires prerequisites.

BR,

Shawn

entry.title: Re: Sicherstellung der Datensicherheit in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hallo Roland

Herzlichen Dank für den Blog - sehr informativ und Hilfreich!

LG

Fränzi

entry.title: FSM Android: Templates for offline HTML reports not selectable
entry.content:
Good morning experts,

I have created a HTML report template for the checkout process. Using on Windows is working fine without any issues.

But the Android app does not offer me the offline reports for selection, only the online report templates are listed:

In the company settings, I have found the setting CoreSystems.Reports.PreviewAsHTML which is related to the reports on Android. But activating this setting does not solve the situation.

Can anybody help me?

Thanks and best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: Multiple email to ship to party
entry.content:
Hi 

Could you please let me know if it is possible to maintain multiple email email address to ship to party while creating sales order using bapi.

Currently I am using BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 and I can pass single email in parameter "partneraddresses" and this is getting updated while I need to maintain multiple emails. 

Thanks
